_note: Sample list — pending production update. Hiren to confirm the canonical 8 robustness tests.

tests.name: Out-of-sample validation
tests.description: System parameters fixed before 2022; 2022 bear market evaluated with no adjustments.

tests.name: Walk-forward analysis
tests.description: Rolling re-estimation across the 15-year window; edge holds across all walk-forward partitions.

tests.name: Parameter sensitivity
tests.description: Edge stable across reasonable parameter perturbations; no single parameter is load-bearing.

tests.name: Regime split
tests.description: Performance evaluated separately across bull, bear, and sideways regimes; edge present in each.

tests.name: Top-3 outlier removal
tests.description: Edge net of the three largest winning trades remains positive (+$567).

tests.name: Statistical significance test
tests.description: p-value of 0.023 against a null of zero expectancy; edge is not attributable to chance.

tests.name: Stress-event evaluation
tests.description: Behavior measured through Q4 2018, March 2020 COVID gap, 2022 bear market, and recent corrections.

tests.name: Drawdown discipline check
tests.description: Maximum drawdown contained to 10% across the full backtest, including stress regimes.
